headlines.description: — Marcus Mariota doesn’t spend much time dwelling on the past.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mariota accounts for 3 TDs, Falcons beat 49ers 28-14

events.name: New England Patriots at Cleveland Browns

headlines.description: — New England Patriots rookie quarterback Bailey Zappe has made the most of the opportunity to get his name out there.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patriots bury Browns, Belichick ties Halas with 324th win

events.name: New York Jets at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Breece Hall, Quinnen Williams and the young New York Jets are making a convincing statement to the rest of the NFL.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jets continue surge with convincing 27-10 win at Green Bay

headlines.description: — Indianapolis Colts coach Frank Reich trusted Matt Ryan to make the right calls Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ryan, Pierce hook up in final minute, Colts beat Jags 34-27

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Andy Dalton had an opportunity to stake a stronger claim on the New Orleans' starting quarterback job.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints offense stalls as New Orleans loses late lead

events.name: Baltimore Ravens at New York Giants

headlines.description: — After five straight losing seasons and three coaching changes, the New York Giants are doing the unexpected under first-year coach Brian Daboll. They are finding ways to win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants rally from 10 down, top Ravens 24-20 on Barkley's run

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — Mitch Trubisky stood on the Acrisure Stadium sideline two weeks ago with a baseball cap on, his future uncertain and his chance at proving he's a capable NFL starting quarterback all but gone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trubisky comes off bench as Steelers stun Brady, Bucs 20-18

events.name: Carolina Panthers at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — When left tackle Joseph Noteboom went down with a probable Achilles tendon injury in the second quarter Sunday, the Los Angeles Rams were suddenly down to one opening day starter on their once-powerful offensive line.
headlines.shortLinkText: LA Rams rally in 2nd half to beat Wilks, Panthers 24-10

headlines.description: — Kenneth Walker III wanted to honor mentor Rashaad Penny in his first start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Walker runs for key TD, Seahawks beat Cardinals 19-9

events.name: Buffalo Bills at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Von Miller had just finished talking about the importance of the Buffalo Bills beating the Kansas City Chiefs at Arrowhead Stadium when he stopped in the hallway outside the visiting locker room and grabbed Josh Allen in a hug.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills rally to beat Chiefs 24-20 in playoff rematch

headlines.description: — The Eagles closed out another familiar outcome — their latest victory as they roll unbeaten into an off week — with a recognizable tune: “Dancing On My Own.” Yes, the Eagles borrowed the signature anthem for the Philadelphia Phillies that they've...
headlines.shortLinkText: Eagles improve to 6-0, Hurts key in 26-17 win over Cowboys
